policy_checks.description: module name is semantic and not a junk drawer
failure modes include safe state and detection
integration contract declares inputs and outputs

seven_pillars.attestation: Generated by MPP R6 validator; decisions are reconstructible from DRS inputs and policy checks.
constraints: No implementation may proceed without validated CDR constraints.
Every high-risk failure mode must declare a detectable safe state.

failure_modes.detectable_by: missing CDR packet or policy gate FAIL

seven_pillars.rationale: Establish enforceable constraints before implementation so MPP decisions cannot drift into unvalidated code.
